name: Four Some
original_name: ស្នេហាបូកបួន
overview:
Jean is a student continuing his studies, and he is attracted to men. Jean meets Ben by chance, and they often misunderstand each other, leading to frequent arguments and teasing. One day, Ben meets Vis, the man of his dreams, and they fall in love, but Vis's girlfriend asks to get back together.

Heartbroken, Jean decides to use Ben to make Vis jealous, but in the process, Ben truly falls in love with Jean.
